title: First Machine to the Fire

hard_fails.rule: em dash or en dash anywhere
factual claim without a resolving claim-id
typo or misspelling in any rendered slide
machine_qa verdict FAIL or pdf_mode != vector
topic repeats a ledger entry within 90 days
hero structure identical to last 4 decks
hashtag count != 3, or link in post body
placeholder, lorem, TODO, or unfinished element

one_sentence_fix: Sculpt the slide-6 hero into a genuinely rendered, rim-lit machine with layered atmosphere so the deck's marquee slide rewards a zoom, and tighten the dead zones on the sparse data slides.
editor_notes_for_email: No hard fails; ships at 8.54 vs 8.3. Honesty posture is the deck's spine: the Dryad detect-and-suppress demo (S6) carries 'Dryad says' plus a COMPANY SELF REPORT / NOT INDEPENDENTLY VERIFIED caveat; the fire-season stats (S3) are labeled BACKGROUND with the 'nearly half' figure tied to 2022; all five finalists are shown equal with no 'final three'. Weakest area is the rendered S6 hero reading flatter than the GPU-PBR ambition; parked for Phase 12.
